title: Telemetry & Data Schema
description: The wire and storage format for everything the OmniDrone produces. This is the contract between aircraft, dock, cloud, twin, and dashboard. Field definitions resolve against data-dictionary.json; do not duplicate semantics here.
design_rules: UTC always, RFC 3339, millisecond precision. Local time is a presentation concern. Storing local time would destroy the diel analysis the first time a site crosses a DST or timezone boundary — and the diel analysis is the product.
Every measurement carries a QC flag at source. Unflagged data is untrusted data.
Every position carries a horizontal accuracy estimate. A position without an error bar cannot answer whether two profiles are at the same station.
Model outputs live in a separate object from measurements. Never the same array.
Records are append-only. A correction is a new record referencing the original.
A TAN reading without its pH and temperature partners at the same depth and instant is rejected at ingestion, not stored and patched later.

sonde_id.note: Critical for biosecurity traceability. Which probe was in which water, when. This field is why an epidemiological trace is possible after an outbreak.

payload_config.note: Which modules were fitted. The mass budget forces per-mission configuration, so this varies and must be recorded.

pilot_id.note: Null only under an authorised autonomous mode. Its absence is a regulatory fact, not a missing field.

calibration_panel_pre.note: Reference to the pre-sortie panel image. An imaging sortie without this is not radiometrically usable.

profile.description: One probe descent and ascent at one station.

station_id.note: Fixed stations make profiles comparable across time. An ad-hoc station is a measurement without a time series.

direction.note: Both are recorded. Comparing them is a free hysteresis check — if descent and ascent disagree, the descent rate exceeded the sensor's response time and the profile is smeared.

is_partial.note: True if max_depth < target_depth. A partial profile cannot compute stratification indices and must never be silently averaged into a site statistic.

sample.description: One instant, one depth, all channels.

depth_m.note: From the pressure transducer, NOT from winch payout. Payout is corrupted by tether angle in current and wind, and the error grows with depth.

payout_m.note: Recorded as a cross-check only. If payout and depth diverge substantially, the tether is streaming and the station position is not what the GPS says.

qc.description: Per-channel QC flag. Keys mirror the channel names, values are QARTOD codes.

sample.note: Nulls mean the channel was not fitted or not read. They never mean zero. A null DO and a 0.0 mg/L DO are radically different facts and conflating them would be catastrophic.

imagery_product.description: A processed imagery output. Never the raw frames — those stay at the edge until bandwidth permits.

solar_elevation_deg.note: Recorded so glint contamination can be assessed retrospectively. A survey flown outside the glint window is not silently discarded — it is flagged.

illumination_stability.note: Derived from the downwelling irradiance log. A survey flown through changing cloud is not comparable and this field is how we know.

radiometric_calibration_ref.note: Which panel image calibrated this. Null means the product is NOT radiometrically comparable to any other product and must be flagged as such.

uncertainty_field_ref.note: Mandatory for any concentration product. A concentration map without an uncertainty field is an overclaim, and it will be believed.

calibration_regression.note: The site-and-day-local fit that converted index to concentration. n_points will often be 3 or 4 — that is the normal case and the honest thing to do is show the resulting wide confidence interval rather than hide it.

detection.description: A model output. Deliberately a separate record type from any measurement.

model_version.note: Without this, a detection cannot be re-evaluated when the model changes, and the historical record becomes uninterpretable.

confidence.note: Calibrated posterior. If it is not calibrated, this field must be null rather than populated with a raw softmax score dressed as a probability.

evidence_ref.note: The image crop. A bare classification with no evidence is unactionable and will be ignored.

human_review.note: Rejections are training data and are as valuable as confirmations.

derived_index.description: Computed limnological quantities. Separate from measurements because they are inferences, even when the inference is deterministic physics.

thermocline_depth_m.note: Null when the column is mixed. Null is a finding, not a gap.

diel_amplitude_mgl.note: Requires both a dawn and an afternoon profile. Two well-timed sorties produce a number that four badly-timed ones cannot.

inputs_complete.note: False if computed from a partial profile. A stability index from a truncated column is not comparable to one from a full column.

dispensing_action.description: A record of material leaving the aircraft. Legally and ethically the most consequential record type in the system.

substance_class.note: veterinary_medicine triggers additional regulatory records. See regulatory-framework.json.

delivered_mass_kg.note: FROM THE LOAD CELL, not from the command. What we intended and what happened are different facts and both must be recorded.

authorised_by.note: A human user id. This field can never be null or system-generated. There is no autonomous dispensing.

dose_ceiling_kg.note: The firmware limit in force for this mission.

qc_flags.convention: QARTOD codes. See data-dictionary.json for the full battery of tests.
qc_flags.the_rule_that_matters: Flag 3 (suspect) data is shown to humans and excluded from automated triggers. This split is deliberate: a human can weigh a suspect reading in context; an alert rule cannot, and a false alarm from a fouled sensor at 04:30 destroys trust in the whole system.

ingestion_validation.reject_rather_than_repair: Malformed records are rejected at the boundary and returned to the dock's error queue. They are NOT partially stored and patched later. A dataset containing quietly repaired records is a dataset nobody can defend in an audit or a thesis.
mandatory_checks: Partner presence — TAN without pH and temp at the same depth and instant is rejected.
QC flags present on every channel.
Imagery concentration products carry an uncertainty field reference.
Dispensing records carry a human authoriser.
